name: Gumroad

composio_registry_match.name: Gumroad
composio_registry_match.description: Gumroad simplifies selling digital goods, physical products, and memberships by offering a streamlined checkout, marketing tools, and direct payout options

description: A creator-focused e-commerce platform for selling digital products, memberships, and courses.
notes: The API allows for managing products, customers, and sales data; OAuth2 is the standard for third-party integrations.
